train.prompt: Implement a user registration form using test-driven development
Build a REST API endpoint following the red-green-refactor cycle
I want to write the tests before writing any implementation code for the payment module
Make sure every function has a failing test before I write it, I want high confidence in the shipping flow
I need to build the order validation logic and I want it to be absolutely bulletproof before deployment
Add a discount calculator to the checkout, I want to be really confident it handles every edge case correctly
Write a function that parses CSV files and handles malformed rows gracefully
I keep finding regressions every time we change the billing code, help me stop that
Deploy the application to AWS with rolling updates and health checks
Design the database schema for a blog platform with categories and tags
Review this pull request for security vulnerabilities and code quality issues

val.prompt: Refactor the authentication service, I need tests driving each change to avoid regressions
Build a file upload handler that I can ship with total confidence, every path needs verification
The invoice calculation is wrong sometimes, I need to nail down exactly what it should do before fixing it
Optimize the PostgreSQL query for the analytics dashboard, it is too slow
Set up nginx as a reverse proxy with SSL termination
